title: Model Lab Intelligence Panel Prioritization and Selected Context Cleanup

right_panel_reordering.selected_state: Selected Model Lab context now renders immediately below the Model Lab Intelligence header, before Current Map View and generic model status content.
right_panel_reordering.default_state: No-selection state keeps a short Model Lab Intelligence sentence, compact relative-band legend, Current Map View, Key Model Status, and collapsed detail controls.
right_panel_reordering.removed_repetition: Generic Development Research Signal explanations and full band definitions no longer appear above selected context.

selected_cluster_summary_changes.title: Selected Research Cluster
selected_cluster_summary_changes.grammar: Single-record selections are labeled as Selected Research Feature and use 1 parcel represented instead of awkward singular/plural cluster wording.

selected_individual_marker_summary_chang.title: Selected Research Feature
selected_individual_marker_summary_chang.safe_copy: Selected feature copy avoids exact probabilities, raw scores, and official classes.

collapsed_explanation_sections.explain_the_numbers: Research bands, calculation workflow, and why probabilities stay hidden are behind Explain the Numbers.
collapsed_explanation_sections.model_qa_details: PR-AUC, Lift@top 5%, and Precision@top 5% are behind Model QA Details.
collapsed_explanation_sections.future_model_ideas: Future model placeholders are behind Future Model Ideas.
collapsed_explanation_sections.methodology_link: Open Methodology Model Lab remains available for deeper explanation.

snapshot_report_integration.report_changes: Planning Snapshot / Executive Summary now uses concise selected model context labels, Parcels represented, Band distribution, Why highlighted, top drivers, and the required internal-only caveat.
snapshot_report_integration.grammar: Report helpers avoid awkward single-record cluster wording.
snapshot_report_integration.technical_metrics: Technical aggregate metrics remain outside the primary report summary unless shown through QA detail UI.

safety_verification.safety_audit_notes: Search hits were limited to existing backend/schema/service guardrail fields and internal transformations; edited UI/report sources are covered by tests that reject unsafe user-facing tokens.

smoke_test_results.dev_server: CFS dev server is running on localhost:3000
smoke_test_results.browser_smoke: blocked: in-app browser navigation timed out despite localhost:3000 responding from shell
smoke_test_results.manual_cluster_click: not browser-verified in this pass because browser navigation timed out

remaining_known_issues: Browser smoke for clicking a rendered Model Lab cluster was not completed because the in-app browser timed out on navigation.
Selected context behavior is covered by static tests and build/type validation; a visual follow-up is recommended once the browser tool is responsive.
